message:
fix: Use named field init for zip tuple struct in ArrayList

The zip() builtin generates a struct with named fields (@"0", @"1", etc.)
for each element position. Zig requires named field initialization syntax
for structs with named fields:

  Before: .{ val0, val1 }  -- positional (only works for unnamed fields)
  After:  .{ .@"0" = val0, .@"1" = val1 }  -- named fields

This fixes the 'does not support array initialization syntax' error when
iterating over zip() results.
